displayTitle: Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm #4
synopsis: For millennia, the Je’daii Masters have protected the planet Tython and maintained a balance within the Force. But now a stranger from another world has come, destroying the balance and engulfing the world in a Force storm that threatens every inhabitant! The ancient Je’daii Order stands on the brink of a powerful discovery. But will this knowledge bring wisdom . . . or peril? Three young Je’daii students may hold the fate of the world in their hands! * Establishes the beginnings of the Jedi! * The Ostrander/Duursema team returns!
title: Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm #4
